security.csp: default-src 'none'; script-src 'self'; connect-src ipc: http://ipc.localhost; img-src 'self' data:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; font-src 'self'; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'none'; form-action 'none'; frame-src 'none'; frame-ancestors 'none'; media-src 'none'; worker-src 'none'; manifest-src 'none'
security.devCsp: default-src 'none'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-eval' http://127.0.0.1:1420; connect-src ipc: http://ipc.localhost http://127.0.0.1:1420 ws://127.0.0.1:1420; img-src 'self' data:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' http://127.0.0.1:1420; font-src 'self'; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'none'; form-action 'none'; frame-src 'none'; frame-ancestors 'none'; media-src 'none'; worker-src 'none'; manifest-src 'none'

headers.Permissions-Policy: camera=(), display-capture=(), geolocation=(), microphone=(), payment=(), usb=()

bundle.shortDescription: An unofficial native Linux workspace for Codex
bundle.longDescription: QuireForge is an unofficial native Linux workspace for local, observable, and approval-aware Codex workflows. It is not made, endorsed, supported, or distributed by OpenAI.
